data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement regarding the points system affecting future slot allocation.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the points system's impact on future slot allocation, but the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or checks that confirm this requirement is satisfied. The linked use case mentions the points system but lacks specific evidence of its implementation or tracking mechanism. Therefore, the validation is inconclusive as there is no definitive proof of the requirement being met.
gaps: No evidence of points system implementation or its effect on future slot allocation.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the points system's impact on future slot allocation.
